Usage: gs stack (s) sync (sy) [flags]

Pull remote-side commits for every branch in the stack

Pull remote-side commits for every branch in the current stack (downstack and
upstack of the named branch), bottom-up. Use --branch to identify a different
stack.

Flags:
  --branch=NAME    Branch to identify the stack
  --rebase         On divergence, replay remote-side commits onto local.

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
